name: Three Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Red onion peeled and diced
8 Tomatillos husked, cored, and cut into one-quarter inch dice
4 Tomatoes seeded and cut into one-quarter inch dice
1 pint Yellow cherry tomatoes seeded and cut into one-quarter inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add the wine and tomatillos; stir to combine.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Add the red and yellow tomatoes to the skillet while the mixture is still warm, but do not reheat or further cook.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper and stir in the basil.
7. Let the relish stand for 15-20 minutes so the flavors meld, or refrigerate up to two hours before using.
